text: Market valuation and investor sentiment risk is evident from significant stock underperformance. Over the 1-year period ending near the as-of date, ADBE returned -36.85% compared to the SPY benchmark return of +16.23%, resulting in an excess return of -53.09% (K015, K016, K017). Even over the recent 30-day period, the stock declined -4.52% while SPY gained 2.15% (K012, K013, K014). This sustained underperformance suggests potential concerns among investors regarding growth prospects, competitive positioning, or valuation levels that could constrain the stock's multiple expansion and increase cost of capital.
